About Us

About Krishna Public School

RBSE Affiliated English-medium school committed to excellence in education since 2016.

Our Story

Shaping Futures Since 2016

Krishna Public School (KPS), Jeewana was established in 2016 with a vision to provide quality education to young minds, especially ensuring no child is deprived of education.

In 2016, KPS received RBSE, Ajmer affiliation and expanded to a sprawling green campus in Jeewana, Jalore. Today we offer world-class English-medium education from Class PG to X.

Under the leadership of Director Mr. Harish Sharma and Chairman Mr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma (Krishna Shikshan and Sodha Sansthan), KPS has grown into a model educational institution for the region.

2016
Founded
Beautiful
Campus
PG–X
RBSE Classes
alt="KPS Campus" />

Our Mission, Vision & Motto

🎯

Our Mission

Marching ahead with the aim of developing leadership in every child through excellent teaching, creativity, and mental and physical growth — nurturing each child with the same dedication as a mother.

🌟

Our Vision

Setting excellence in education through the methodology of enjoyment, excitement, friendship, endurance, discipline, compassion, competition and teamwork — building future leaders.

📜

Our Motto

"We are committed to Quality."

विद्या ददाति विनयम् — Knowledge bestows humility. RBSE affiliated, beautiful campus, Jeewana, Jalore.

"Dear Parents, Season's Greetings. Education in a general sense may be viewed as a lifelong process of growth. I have always believed that Excellence is never an accident — it is always the result of high intention, sincere effort, intelligent direction and skilful execution."

KPS undertakes the task of moulding young minds into valuable assets of society. My best wishes to all students, parents, staff, and well-wishers. Go from strength to strength, Krishna Public School!

PS
Ram Ayodhyan Prasad
Principal, Krishna Public School

Director's Message

"Learning is a never-ending phenomenon." KPS has existed since 2016 serving community needs, guiding students to become intellectually adept, thoughtful, and responsible contributors to wider society.

"The great thing in this world is not so much where we stand, as in what direction we are moving."

HS

Director, Krishna Shikshan and Sodha Sansthan

alt="Library" />

Well-stocked library with books, journals, and reference materials for all grades.

alt="Classrooms" />

Modern Classrooms

Spacious, well-lit classrooms designed for activity-based learning under RBSE guidelines.

alt="Auditorium" />

Auditorium

Grand auditorium for annual day, cultural programmes, debates, and community events.

Residential Hostel

Safe, structured hostel on the beautiful campus offering residential facilities for students.

Sports Ground

Dedicated sports grounds for cricket, football, and other games to build fitness and team spirit.

Our Journey

KPS Milestones

2016

School Established

KPS was founded in Jeewana, Jalore with a commitment that no child should be deprived of education. Classes began with dedication to quality English-medium learning under the RBSE board.

2018

Campus & Infrastructure Growth

Developed a beautiful green campus equipped with modern science labs, computer labs, a well-stocked library, and spacious classrooms to support activity-based learning.

2022

Academic Expansion

Expanded classes to secondary level (Class IX–X), guiding students to academic excellence and top results in board exams.

2025

Continuing Excellence

KPS continues to grow as a leading educational institution in the Jeewana and Jalore region, nurturing talents through holistic education.

Academics

Academic Programmes

RBSE affiliated curriculum from Class PG to X — designed for conceptual clarity and holistic growth.

Programmes Offered

Classes PG to X — RBSE

Our comprehensive curriculum follows RBSE, Ajmer guidelines with activity-based, child-centred learning at every level.

🌱

Pre-Primary

Class PG – KG

Play-way method of learning, focusing on cognitive, physical, and social-emotional development.

Age: 3–5 years
📖

Primary Stage

Class I – V

Activity-based, child-centric learning in English, Hindi, Mathematics, EVS, GK, Art & Craft, Physical Education.

Age: 6–11 years
🏆

Middle Stage

Class VI – VIII

Building concepts in Science, Mathematics, Social Science, English, Hindi, Sanskrit, Computer Science.

Age: 11–14 years
🎯

Secondary Stage

Class IX – X

Board preparation: Science, Mathematics, Social Science, English, Hindi/Sanskrit. Practical training.

Admissions

Admissions 2026–27

Applications open for Classes PG to X — Day Scholar & Hostel. RBSE English-medium, Jeewana.

How to Apply

Admission Process

1

Enquiry

Call +91-9468649165 / +91-7426889165 or visit school office during Mon–Sat 9AM–5PM.

2

Application Form

Fill the admission form with student details and required documents.

3

Interaction

Student interaction / assessment at school. Parents meet with Principal.

4

Confirmation

Fee payment and confirmation. Welcome to the KPS family!

Documents Required

  • ✓ Transfer Certificate (if applicable)
  • ✓ Passport size photographs (4 nos.)
  • ✓ Aadhar Card (Student & Parent)
  • ✓ Caste Certificate (if applicable)
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Is KPS a residential school?+
Yes. KPS offers both residential (hostel) and day scholar options. The hostel is on the beautiful campus with supervised study, meals, and activities.
Which board is KPS affiliated to?+
KPS is affiliated to RBSE (Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education), Ajmer. Classes run from PG to X in English medium.
When do admissions open?+
Admissions for the 2026–27 session are currently open. It is advisable to apply early as seats are limited.
What is the medium of instruction?+
English is the primary medium of instruction. Hindi is taught as a compulsory subject throughout all classes.
How can I contact the admissions office?+
Call +91-9468649165 or +91-7426889165, email kpsjeewana@gmail.com, or visit Jeewana, Dist. Jalore during Mon–Sat 9AM–5PM.
